notes: Copy this file to data/app-config.json and replace the Supabase values.
Do not commit data/app-config.json if it contains real keys.
Anonymous request writes should use RPC only. Do not expose raw request_votes or request_search_signals to the public client.
Admin actions should use Supabase Auth login with app_metadata.role=admin.
adminAccessToken is only a legacy local/staging fallback. Do not ship it in a public static build.
User GPS location is never stored. Only public spot_locations coordinates are stored.
